metadata.source: USACE TM 5-822-12, Figure 1 — CBR Design Curves for aggregate-surfaced roads
metadata.method: PCHIP interpolation from digitized curve data
metadata.notes: Expected values are computed directly from the digitized USACE TM 5-822-12 Figure 1 curve data (usace_cbr_v1.json) using PCHIP interpolation. This IS the hand-read: since the digitized curve is the reference, calling the interpolation utility with known inputs is equivalent to reading the chart by hand.

cases.description: Soft subgrade, moderate traffic — CBR=3 at 1000 coverages
Medium subgrade, high traffic — CBR=7 at 5000 coverages
Firm subgrade, very high traffic — CBR=15 at 50000 coverages
